response.justification: While the candidate has extensive experience in software development, leadership, and mentoring, their background does not align well with the core requirements of the role. They lack significant experience in C++ (only 1 year at National Instruments), distributed systems, large-scale infrastructure, and cloud architecture. Their leadership roles focus more on team contributions than technical leadership or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and teaching (e.g., TDD workshops, Selenium courses)
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Experience with large-scale systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (only 1 year, minimum required is 8)
Limited experience with cloud architecture or compute technologies (no direct mention in resume)
Lacks production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs
